ArchitectureNotes.objective: Stage-based pipeline: video → slide intervals (standalone) → notes + visual context → export. Projects tie all stages together. Desktop GUI provides menu bar, video player with subtitle overlay, enhanced timeline with green/blue markers, project/app settings, and smart manual marker snapping. Core pipeline remains CLI-first with GUI as optional overlay.
ArchitectureNotes.non-goal: No ASR, no cloud processing, no web UI, no drag-to-reorder slides in MVP, no real-time streaming from network URLs.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-1: False slide splits due to cursor movement, webcam, or compression artifacts.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-2: GPU backend may not be available — CPU fallback must always work.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-3: detect-slides is the longest step (2 video passes). Notes and export are fast.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-4: PySide6 adds ~50MB dependency — must be optional via extras.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-5: QThread lifecycle bugs may cause crashes when switching projects mid-operation.

contract.purpose: Define all Pydantic data models used across the pipeline.

param.name: SlidesDocument, SlideSegment, VideoInfo, Roi, SubtitleCue, FrameFeatures

contract.purpose: Load configuration from YAML file and merge with CLI arguments.
Typer CLI with detect (all-in-one), detect-slides, notes, roi-tool, project, export-md, export-pptx, debug, llm-process commands.
Video decoder backends: OpenCV (CPU), PyAV (CUDA). Auto-select best available and report exact decoded-frame, ndarray-conversion, and RGB-transfer telemetry.
Unified video decoder — select backend, iterate sampled frames.
Crop slide region, apply ignore masks. auto = full for MVP.
Extract pHash, dHash, grayscale, histogram, pixel MAE. Compute weighted visual distance.
Compare consecutive frames, detect changes, and apply debounce while preserving the governed ChangeEvent/detect_changes contracts and detect-init/process/debounce anchors.
Convert change events to slide intervals, choose representative timestamps.
Merge duplicate adjacent segments via hash/SSIM similarity.
Parse SRT/VTT, align cues to slide intervals by timestamp overlap.
Export slides.json to Marp-formatted deck.md.
Export slides.json to PPTX presentation with slide images and speaker notes.
Process raw transcript into clean speaker notes: basic cleanup or LLM rephrase.
Generate debug artifacts: diff_scores.csv, timeline.png, contact_sheet.jpg
Generic LLM client abstraction over OpenAI-compatible API (LM Studio) with vision support.
Analyze slide screenshot via LLM vision: extract visual description and on-screen text terms.
Coordinate full LLM pipeline: load model → analyze slides → rephrase transcript → unload → save.
Wire all modules together in cli.py detect command (all-in-one mode).

M-DETECT-SLIDES.NAME: DetectSlides

contract.purpose: Standalone two-pass slide detection pipeline: video → slides.json + screenshots. Document construction and persistence remain inside the RSS sampler lifecycle; cleanup is unconditional and peak RSS is max(before, sampled, after).

M-DETECT-SLIDES.depends: M-VIDEO-DECODE, M-SLIDE-DETECTOR, M-SEGMENTER, M-DEDUPE, M-ROI, M-MODELS, M-DETECT-METRICS

contract.purpose: Post-process notes pipeline: slides.json + subtitles → cleaned notes. No video re-decode.

param.name: slides.json
param.type: Path — updated slides.json with cleaned notes

contract.purpose: Graphical ROI selection tool: OpenCV window, mouse drag rect, prints coordinates to stdout.
Project management: create, open, save projects. Project JSON schema with video/subtitle paths, detection/LLM configs, pipeline state.

param.name: project.json
param.type: project.json file with all settings and state

M-GUI-MAIN.NAME: MainWindow

contract.purpose: Main GUI window: QMainWindow with project toolbar (new/open/save), video/subtitle selector, backend/GPU info panel, detect button, central area with timeline and subtitle panel.

M-GUI-MAIN.depends: M-PROJECT, M-GUI-TIMELINE, M-GUI-SETTINGS, M-GUI-WORKER, M-DETECT-SLIDES, M-NOTES, M-BACKENDS

contract.purpose: Custom QWidget timeline: paint slide intervals on a time axis, click to select, right panel shows subtitle text + LLM process button.
Settings dialog with tabs: LLM (edit system prompt, model, base_url), GPU/Backend (select decoder backend, show CUDA info), Detection (threshold, min duration, ROI).
QThread-based background workers: DetectWorker, NotesWorker, LlmWorker. Progress/result/error signals. UI remains responsive during long operations.

QMenuBar with File menu (New/Open/Close/Save Project, Import Video, Import Subtitles, Exit) and Edit menu (Project Settings, App Settings). Standard shortcuts (Ctrl+N/O/S/Q). Close unloads project and resets UI. Import Video/Subtitles replaces sources in current project.

QMediaPlayer + QVideoWidget with transport controls: play/pause/stop buttons, seek slider, volume slider, time counter (current/total). Emits positionChanged for subtitle sync. Supports local video files only.
Parse SRT/VTT via pysubs2, render subtitle text as overlay on QVideoWidget. Sync with video playback position. No overlay if no subtitles available.

param.name: overlay
param.type: QLabel or QGraphicsItem positioned over video widget with current subtitle text

contract.purpose: Enhanced timeline: green markers from slides.json (detected). Blue markers from user (manual). Left-click selects a marker. Double-click on green marker opens slide image in system viewer (QDesktopServices.openUrl). Right-click on time axis adds blue marker. Context menu on blue marker to edit/delete/snap.

Store and persist user-defined blue markers in project.json. CRUD operations on markers. On marker creation, calls M-GUI-SMART-SNAP to snap to nearest scene boundary. Snapped markers stored with both original and snapped timestamps.

Three smart snap strategies for snapping a manual marker to the nearest scene boundary. diff_only: uses existing diff_scores from slides.json (window ±5s, find local max). fallback_analyze: tries diff_scores first, if none available decodes ±3s window at sample_fps=5 and computes fresh frame differences. hybrid: uses diff_scores, if window is flat (max-min < snap_flat_threshold) falls back to high-res analysis (±2s, sample_fps=10).

Project Settings dialog: editable fields for ROI (x1,y1,x2,y2), ignore_rois list, threshold, sample_fps, min_slide_duration, dedupe_enabled, min_stable_duration. Values read from project.json, saved on OK.

App Settings dialog: LLM tab (model name, base_url, context length), GPU/Backend tab (backend selector: auto/OpenCV/PyAV, CUDA info), Snap tab (snap_mode dropdown, snap_flat_threshold), Default Paths tab (default project dir). Values read from app-config.yaml, saved on OK. New projects inherit these defaults.

App-wide configuration persistence: reads/writes app-config.yaml in platform-appropriate config directory (Windows: %APPDATA%/video2pptx/config.yaml, Linux/macOS: ~/.config/video2pptx/config.yaml). Fields: LLM model/base_url/context_length, GPU backend default, snap_mode, snap_flat_threshold, default_project_dir. New projects created with inherited defaults. CLI fallback: no app-config = built-in defaults.

M-APP-SERVICE.NAME: AppService

contract.purpose: Canonical application service — single entry point for GUI slots, MCP tools, and CLI. No Qt, no HTTP.

M-APP-SERVICE.depends: M-DETECT-SLIDES, M-AUTO-ALIGN, M-NOTES, M-MD-EXPORT, M-PPTX-EXPORT, M-PROJECT-VALIDATOR

contract.purpose: Align visual slide boundaries to subtitle anchors via coordinated global choice, idempotent, with rollback and metrics.
Operation lifecycle registry for MCP async ops — queued/running/succeeded/failed/cancelled with timestamps, progress, trace_id.
Typed operation error: type/message/stage/recoverable/trace_id/details. Full traceback to log; never swallow.
Destructive-op confirmation: explicit confirm=true required. VIDEO2PPTX_TEST_MODE=1 still needs explicit args. No global auto-confirm.
Atomic JSON writer: temp file + os.replace. Prevents partial-file corruption.
Wire OperationRegistry into MCP. Write tools create op → run app_service in OpRunnerThread → return operation_id. Lifecycle tools.
Extended read tools: get_app_state/get_ui_state/get_project/get_timeline/get_slide/get_subtitle_clip/get_logs/list_artifacts/capture_screenshot.
Full write tool set delegating to app_service; enforces confirm for destructive ops.
Read-only snapshot of MainWindow buttons (visible/enabled/text), title, status, busy, current_operation.
validate_project: schema, file existence, interval invariants, no double paths, slide-count consistency, export freshness, MD/PPTX integrity, pipeline state, alignment report.
Extend ProjectState flags: preview_done/detect_done/align_done/notes_done/md_exported/pptx_exported/auto_done + per-stage stale booleans.
Unify slide CRUD into one canonical path. Public 1-based index, internal 0-based, uid preferred. Fixes off-by-one.
Five distinct stage buttons (Quick Preview/Detect/Auto Align/Process Notes/Auto) whose slots delegate to app_service — no business logic in slots.
Harden McpServer: port 9812–9816 fallback, stale .mcp_port cleanup, registry clear on restart, SSE stop, localhost-only bind, live serverInfo, graceful shutdown.
Headless E2E runner: launch GUI subprocess, find port, initialize, run scenarios with before/after snapshots + wait_operation, emit HTML/JSON/junit report. No fixed sleeps.
Capture full state snapshot: app/ui/project/timeline/artifacts/logs/screenshot + copy project.json/slides.json for diff.
pytest E2E-001..015 happy + E2E-101..119 negative, each with before/after snapshot, postcondition assertions, 4-view consistency.
Target layered architecture: domain/application/ports/infrastructure/adapters. See docs/architecture.md for full detail.
Frozen value objects: SlideId, TimeInterval (validated), ArtifactRef (normalized relative path), PipelineState enum
Project aggregate root with invariant control, slide CRUD, downstream invalidation, state transitions. Canonical source of truth.
Revision-aware port for loading/saving Project aggregate through LoadedProject and SaveResult.
Strict schema 2.0 DTO containing full pipeline, portable artifacts, extensions, and canonical revision.
Deterministic schema 1.0 to 2.0 migration preserving unknown legacy fields and stable UIDs.
Canonical atomic project commit with revisioned derived slides artifact, strict validation, and optimistic concurrency.
Produce immutable preview score data without mutating project or persistence.
Return a complete immutable candidate slide set from video input and detection options.
Compute an immutable alignment plan and metrics without applying aggregate mutations.
Produce basic or LLM note results while preserving raw subtitle cues.
Stage Markdown or PPTX output from immutable project snapshots and return artifact metadata.
Application-layer update check: UpdateService (version compare, channel filter), ReleaseProvider protocol, GitHubReleaseProvider (httpx). No Qt, no GUI.
GUI adapter: UpdateController (QObject), UpdateAvailableDialog (QDialog). Orchestrates fetch-compare-show. No business logic.
Shared DTOs, errors, cancellation, observer, and service context for all stage services.
Canonical waveform-only preview use case with revision-safe persistence and no slide invalidation.
Canonical CV detection use case applying a complete validated candidate set through the aggregate.
Canonical dry-run/apply alignment use case using full-plan validation and atomic aggregate application.
Canonical basic/LLM notes use case preserving raw cues and forbidding silent LLM fallback.
Canonical staged Markdown/PPTX exports from immutable aggregate snapshots with output validation.
Validate storage, aggregate, media, artifacts, exports, and derived revision consistency.
Coordinate full/resume/force by composing stage services without duplicating stage algorithms.
Create and query canonical schema 2.0 projects through ProjectRepository.
Apply explicit LLM slide enrichment to the canonical aggregate without silent fallback.
Build one operation-scoped service bundle shared by CLI and MCP adapters.

M-CLI-ADAPTER.NAME: CliAdapter

contract.purpose: Parse Typer input, invoke one canonical application service, render results/errors, and return documented exit codes.

M-CLI-ADAPTER.depends: M-APP-BOOTSTRAP, M-APP-PREVIEW, M-APP-DETECT, M-APP-ALIGN, M-APP-NOTES, M-APP-EXPORT, M-APP-VALIDATE, M-APP-AUTO

contract.purpose: Create, open, save, and query projects through ApplicationServices; signal state changes to MainWindow.

M-GUI-PIPELINE-CTRL.NAME: PipelineController

contract.purpose: Run stage services through operation-scoped ApplicationServices on a worker thread; emit queued progress, cancellation, completion, and error signals.

M-GUI-PIPELINE-CTRL.depends: M-GUI-PIPELINE-WORKER, M-APP-BOOTSTRAP, M-APP-PREVIEW, M-APP-DETECT, M-APP-ALIGN, M-APP-NOTES, M-APP-EXPORT, M-APP-AUTO

contract.purpose: Mutate slides only by SlideId, including canonical ArtifactRef image assignment, then publish revision-safe persisted state changes.
Own one QThread-bound pipeline operation and execute an operation-scoped ApplicationServices composition without blocking the Qt main thread.
Construct and connect MainWindow toolbar, info row, central widgets, and optional MCP host adapter without project or pipeline business logic.

DF-001.NAME: DetectPipeline
DF-001.step-2: Open video, iterate sampled frames, detect changes (M-SLIDE-DETECTOR)
DF-001.step-4: Parse subtitles and align cues (M-SUBTITLES) — optional
DF-001.step-6: Run notes if subtitles provided (M-NOTES) — optional

DF-005.NAME: DetectSlidesPipeline
DF-005.step-2: Open video, detect changes, build segments, dedupe (M-DETECT-SLIDES)
DF-005.evidence: slides.json with intervals and images, no transcript.

DF-004.NAME: NotesPipeline
DF-004.step-2: Parse subtitles, align cues to existing segments (M-SUBTITLES) — optional
DF-004.evidence: slides.json transcript fields updated. No video re-decode.

DF-006.NAME: RoiToolFlow
DF-006.step-1: Open video, extract one representative frame
DF-006.step-2: Display frame in OpenCV window with mouse drag rectangle
DF-006.step-3: On Enter/Space: output coordinates to stdout

DF-007.NAME: CreateProject
DF-007.TRIGGER: CLI project create or GUI New Project
DF-007.step-1: Create output directory + project.json with video/subtitle paths and default config

DF-008.NAME: DetectInProject
DF-008.TRIGGER: GUI Detect button or CLI detect --project
DF-008.step-2: Run detect-slides (M-DETECT-SLIDES) via worker (GUI) or directly (CLI)
DF-008.step-3: Update project.json state: detect_done=true, set slides_json path
DF-008.evidence: slides.json with intervals + images. project.json state updated. Worker emits progress signals in GUI mode.

DF-009.NAME: ViewTimeline
DF-009.TRIGGER: GUI — after detection or opening existing project
DF-009.step-1: Load slides.json → extract segments + video duration
DF-009.step-2: Timeline widget: paint colored blocks for each segment on time axis
DF-009.step-3: Click segment → right panel shows subtitle text + timecodes
DF-009.evidence: Timeline rendered with correct segment count. Clicking changes subtitle panel text.

DF-010.NAME: LLMProcessInGUI
DF-010.TRIGGER: GUI — user clicks Process button in timeline view
DF-010.step-1: Send current segment transcript to LLM via worker with system prompt from settings
DF-010.step-3: Display updated text in subtitle panel
DF-010.evidence: Text updated, slides.json saved, no UI freeze during LLM call

DF-011.NAME: ProjectLifecycleMenu
DF-011.TRIGGER: GUI — user interacts with File menu
DF-011.step-1: User selects New/Open/Close/Save from File menu (M-GUI-MENUBAR)
DF-011.step-2: MenuBar emits signal with action type → MainWindow handles
DF-011.step-3: New/Open: launches file dialogs → creates/loads Project → updates UI
DF-011.step-4: Close: stops video player, clears timeline, unloads project, resets info labels
DF-011.step-5: Save: force-writes project.json with current state
DF-011.step-6: Import Video/Subtitles: updates project video/subtitle paths, saves project.json
DF-011.evidence: Menu items visible and clickable. Keyboard shortcuts work. Project state consistent before/after close/open.

DF-012.NAME: SettingsConfiguration
DF-012.TRIGGER: GUI — Edit > Project Settings or App Settings
DF-012.step-1: User selects Project Settings → M-GUI-SETTINGS-PROJECT dialog opens with current project config
DF-012.step-2: User edits ROI, thresholds, fps etc → clicks OK → values validated and saved to project.json
DF-012.step-3: User selects App Settings → M-GUI-SETTINGS-APP dialog opens with current app config from M-GUI-APPCONFIG
DF-012.step-4: User edits LLM, GPU, snap_mode etc → clicks OK → values saved to app-config.yaml
DF-012.step-5: New projects created after this point inherit app defaults for LLM config, GPU backend, snap_mode
DF-012.evidence: Settings persist across app restarts. New projects show inherited values. Invalid values rejected with error message.

DF-013.NAME: VideoPlayback
DF-013.TRIGGER: GUI — user interacts with video player controls
DF-013.step-1: Video loaded from project path → QMediaPlayer setSource → QVideoWidget displays frames
DF-013.step-2: Play button → player.play(). Pause → player.pause(). Stop → player.stop() + seek(0)
DF-013.step-3: Seek slider → player.setPosition(slider.value). Volume slider → player.audioOutput().setVolume()
DF-013.step-4: Time counter updates on positionChanged → formatted MM:SS / total duration
DF-013.step-5: positionChanged → M-GUI-SUBTITLE-OVERLAY updates visible subtitle text at current timestamp
DF-013.evidence: Video plays in GUI window. Controls respond correctly. Subtitles appear/disappear at correct times. Seeking updates subtitle immediately.

DF-014.NAME: TimelineGreenMarkers
DF-014.TRIGGER: GUI — after detection or loading existing slides.json
DF-014.step-1: Load slides.json → extract SlideSegment list with timestamps and image paths
DF-014.step-2: M-GUI-TIMELINE-V2 renders green blocks on time axis at each segment interval
DF-014.step-3: User double-clicks green block → QDesktopServices.openUrl(slide_image_path) → system image viewer
DF-014.step-4: User left-clicks green block → emits selected_slide_changed → subtitle panel updates
DF-014.evidence: Green markers match slide count and intervals from slides.json. Double-click opens image in system viewer. Left-click selects and updates panel.

DF-015.NAME: TimelineBlueMarkers
DF-015.step-1: User right-clicks on timeline at timestamp T → context menu appears: "Add marker here"
DF-015.step-3: MarkerManager calls M-GUI-SMART-SNAP.snap(T, snap_mode) → returns snapped timestamp T'
DF-015.step-4: Blue marker rendered at T' on timeline (original T shown as tooltip on hover)
DF-015.step-5: Marker persisted in project.json → markers list with {original, snapped, snap_mode}
DF-015.step-6: Context menu also: "Delete marker", "Snap again" (re-runs snap with current settings)
DF-015.evidence: Blue marker appears on timeline. Snap adjusts position if scene boundary nearby. Marker persisted and restored on project reopen. Re-snap changes position if settings changed.

DF-E2E-01.NAME: McpWriteOperationLifecycle
DF-E2E-01.step-1: ConfirmPolicy.check(args) — reject destructive without confirm=true with ConfirmRequiredError
DF-E2E-01.step-3: Enqueue on OpRunnerThread; MCP returns {operation_id, status:queued}
DF-E2E-01.step-5: On success op→succeeded(result); on failure op→failed(StructuredError); on cancel op→cancelled
DF-E2E-01.step-6: Qt signals from ProjectModel refresh GUI
DF-E2E-01.evidence: operation_id traceable end-to-end; wait_operation returns terminal status; no modal blocks MCP

DF-E2E-02.NAME: CanonicalDetectStage
DF-E2E-02.TRIGGER: GUI Detect / MCP detect / CLI / auto stage 1
DF-E2E-02.step-1: app_service.run_detect(video, out_dir, cfg) → run_detect_slides → slides.json + screenshots
DF-E2E-02.step-3: NO align, NO notes, NO export, NO LLM
DF-E2E-02.evidence: slides.json valid, deck.md/deck.pptx absent, Auto Align becomes enabled

DF-E2E-03.NAME: AutoPipelineModes
DF-E2E-03.step-1: mode=full: detect → align(if subs, else skipped) → notes → export_md → export_pptx → save → validate
DF-E2E-03.step-2: mode=resume: skip stages whose state flag is true and not stale
DF-E2E-03.step-3: mode=force: re-run all stages, overwrite artifacts
DF-E2E-03.step-4: On stage failure: halt, keep good artifacts, op→failed, state records failing stage
DF-E2E-03.step-5: validate_project must return valid=true for auto_done=true
DF-E2E-03.evidence: all stages recorded in op result; progress monotonic; auto_done=true only if valid

DF-E2E-04.NAME: AutoAlignCoordinated
DF-E2E-04.step-1: Build candidate anchors for ALL internal boundaries from subtitle cues + visual fallback
DF-E2E-04.step-2: Coordinated global choice (DP/sequential with neighbor min_duration check) — not fully independent
DF-E2E-04.step-3: Invariant validate: monotonic, no overlap/gap, count/order preserved, min_duration respected
DF-E2E-04.step-3a: dry_run=true: return plan only, no mutation
DF-E2E-04.step-4: apply: write alignment_report.json, redistribute cues by max-overlap, invalidate cleaned/llm transcript
DF-E2E-04.step-5: Idempotent: re-run does not drift. Rollback restores visual boundaries.
DF-E2E-04.evidence: alignment_report.json with metrics; cue-split count non-increasing; transcripts invalidated

DF-E2E-05.NAME: VerificationStepProtocol
DF-E2E-05.evidence: per-step snapshot dirs; junit.xml; defects.json on failure

DF-PERSIST-01.NAME: CanonicalProjectLoadSave
DF-PERSIST-01.step-1: FileProjectRepository parses schema 2.0 through M-PERSIST-DTO or migrates schema 1.0 through M-PERSIST-MIGRATIONS.
DF-PERSIST-01.step-2: Mapper rehydrates M-DOMAIN-PROJECT without business transitions or downstream invalidation.
DF-PERSIST-01.step-3: load returns LoadedProject with location, canonical revision, migration flag, and warnings.
DF-PERSIST-01.step-4: save verifies expected_revision and atomically commits project.json with a new revision.
DF-PERSIST-01.step-5: Repository regenerates slides.json with matching source_revision; failure leaves canonical state valid and derived state stale.
DF-PERSIST-01.evidence: DTO round-trip, revision conflict, corrupt canonical document, and derived revision tests.

DF-APP-01.NAME: RevisionSafeApplicationUseCase
DF-APP-01.TRIGGER: CLI, GUI, or MCP application command
DF-APP-01.step-1: Adapter creates command DTO and invokes a PySide6-free application service.
DF-APP-01.step-2: Service loads LoadedProject and invokes only domain methods and application ports.
DF-APP-01.step-3: Port returns immutable candidate data; service validates the complete result before aggregate mutation.
DF-APP-01.step-4: Mutating services save with loaded.revision; dry-run services do not save.
DF-APP-01.step-5: Service returns a typed result; AutoService composes the same stage services for full, resume, and force.
DF-APP-01.evidence: Service tests with fake ports, revision conflicts, cancellation, failure atomicity, and architecture import checks.

DF-CLI-ADAPTER.NAME: CliApplicationDispatch
DF-CLI-ADAPTER.step-1: Typer parses PROJECT_DIR and options into adapter values.
DF-CLI-ADAPTER.step-2: CliContext builds one operation-scoped ApplicationServices bundle with observer and cancellation token.
DF-CLI-ADAPTER.step-3: Command handler invokes exactly one application service; AutoService alone owns multi-stage orchestration.
DF-CLI-ADAPTER.step-4: Renderer maps ServiceResult or typed error to human/JSON output and centralized exit code.
DF-CLI-ADAPTER.evidence: CLI architecture tests contain no forbidden legacy pipeline imports; CLI and MCP characterization remain semantically equivalent.

DF-GUI-PROJECT.NAME: GuiProjectFlow
DF-GUI-PROJECT.step-3: Controller emits PySide signal with LoadedProject or error.
DF-GUI-PROJECT.evidence: GUI project round-trip, error handling, signal emission tests.

DF-GUI-PIPELINE.NAME: GuiPipelineFlow
DF-GUI-PIPELINE.step-2: PipelineController delegates to ApplicationServices stage service; worker runs in QThread.
DF-GUI-PIPELINE.step-3: Worker emits progress signals; PipelineController relays as typed PySide signals.
DF-GUI-PIPELINE.step-4: MainWindow connects signals to status bar, timeline, and widget updates.
DF-GUI-PIPELINE.evidence: GUI pipeline round-trip, signal wiring, cancellation tests.

DF-GUI-TIMELINE.NAME: GuiTimelineFlow
DF-GUI-TIMELINE.step-2: TimelineController validates through ApplicationServices (repository load/save with revision).
DF-GUI-TIMELINE.step-3: Controller emits signal with new SlideView list.
DF-GUI-TIMELINE.evidence: Timeline CRUD, revision-safe save, undo not required for MVP.

Phase-5.name: PipelineGPTBackendColab
Phase-5.goal: Full pipeline integration, GPU backend, Colab.

Phase-7.name: SplitPipeline
Phase-7.goal: Split monolithic detect into independent stages.

Phase-8.name: RoiTool
Phase-8.goal: Graphical ROI selector for ignore region.

Phase-9.name: ProjectManagement
Phase-9.goal: Create project system: project.json schema, CRUD operations, CLI subcommands. Projects tie video, subtitles, configs, and pipeline state into a single output folder.
Phase-9.step-26: Create src/video2pptx/project_manager.py with Project model (pydantic), project.json I/O, state management. Add project create/open/info CLI subcommands in cli.py.
Phase-9.stop-condition: project.json must be human-readable and re-openable. CLI project commands must round-trip (create → open → verify paths resolve).

Phase-10.name: DesktopGUI
Phase-10.goal: Desktop GUI with PySide6: main window, timeline, settings dialog, background workers. GUI must be optional (extras = ["gui"]).
Phase-10.step-27: Create src/video2pptx/gui/ package. main_window.py: QMainWindow with project toolbar, video/subtitle file selectors, backend/GPU status panel, detect button, central splitter (timeline | subtitle panel). Entry point: video2pptx-gui or python -m video2pptx.gui.
Phase-10.step-28: Create src/video2pptx/gui/timeline_widget.py: custom QWidget with QPainter-drawn timeline. Colored blocks for slide intervals. Click selects → signal emitted. Right panel: QTextEdit with subtitle text + Process via LLM button.
Phase-10.step-29: Create src/video2pptx/gui/settings_dialog.py: QDialog with QTabWidget. LLM tab: QPlainTextEdit for system prompt, model name, base URL. GPU/Backend tab: radio buttons for backend selection, CUDA availability info. Detection tab: threshold, min duration, ROI fields. Settings saved to project.json.
Phase-10.step-30: Create src/video2pptx/gui/workers.py: QObject + QThread workers for detect, notes, llm operations. Signals: started, progress(int, str), finished(Path), error(str). Workers use existing M-DETECT-SLIDES, M-NOTES, M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR.
Phase-10.stop-condition: GUI must not block during detect or LLM calls. Detecting in GUI must produce same slides.json as CLI detect-slides. Workers must clean up on project switch or app close.

Phase-11.name: DesktopGUIEnhancements
Phase-11.goal: Enhanced GUI: app config persistence, smart marker snapping, video player with subtitle overlay, timeline v3 with drag/resize, project/app settings dialogs, menu bar, status bar manager, subtitle editor.
Phase-11.step-31: App-wide YAML config in platform config dir. Fields: LLM model/base_url, GPU backend, snap settings, default project dir, notes mode.
Phase-11.step-32: QGraphicsVideoItem in QGraphicsView with transport controls, subtitle overlay, keyboard navigation.
Phase-11.step-33: QGraphicsView-based multi-track timeline: SlideBlockItem (drag/resize), SubtitleBlockItem, PlayheadItem, TimeRulerItem.
Phase-11.step-34: File menu (New/Open/Close/Save, Import Video/Subtitles) + Edit menu (Project/App Settings). Emits signals.
Phase-11.stop-condition: All GUI tests pass headless. Timeline v3 renders slides and waveforms. Export buttons functional.

Phase-12.name: DomainModelRefactoring
Phase-12.goal: Extract domain logic from MainWindow (god class) into active Qt models: ProjectModel (project lifecycle + signals) and TimelineModel (Clip/Track/Timeline). MainWindow becomes thin controller.
Phase-12.step-35: Create src/video2pptx/timeline_model.py: Clip(ABC), SlideClip, SubtitleClip, MarkerClip, ScoreClip, Track(QObject), ScoreTrack(Track), Timeline(QObject) with signals.
Phase-12.step-36: Create src/video2pptx/project_model.py: ProjectModel(QObject) — active model wrapping project state with Qt signals for GUI binding. Bridges CLI project_manager with GUI timeline model.
Phase-12.stop-condition: ProjectModel and TimelineModel test suites pass (15 tests). Models emit correct signals on state changes.

Phase-14.name: DebugInfrastructure
Phase-14.goal: Add in-app debug tools: LogBridge (loguru→Qt), DebugDock (log viewer + state tree), SignalSpy (signal tracing), MCP Server + ActionRegistry.
Phase-14.step-37: Create src/video2pptx/gui/log_bridge.py: LogBridge(QObject) — singleton, loguru sink, newLog Qt signal, ring buffer of last 500 entries, recent(n) method.
Phase-14.step-38: Create src/video2pptx/gui/debug_dock.py: DebugDock(QDockWidget) with QTabWidget (LogPanel + StatePanel). Ctrl+D toggle. LogPanel: QTextEdit with level filter combo. StatePanel: QTreeWidget showing Timeline→Track→Clip hierarchy with Refresh button.
Phase-14.step-39: Create src/video2pptx/gui/signal_spy.py: SignalSpy.watch/watch_all — subscribes to Qt signals, logs via loguru→LogBridge.
Phase-14.step-40: Create src/video2pptx/debug/mcp_server.py: MCP HTTP/SSE server on :9812. Read tools: get_state, get_project, get_logs, get_clip. Write tools via command queue. Action tools via ActionRegistry.
Phase-14.step-41: Create src/video2pptx/debug/action_registry.py: @mcp_action decorator + ActionRegistry class. Auto-discovers MCP tools from decorated methods, builds JSON inputSchema from type hints.
Phase-14.step-42: Add _setup_debug_dock() to MainWindow.__init__: instantiate LogBridge.instance(), create DebugDock, attach as QDockWidget, add Ctrl+D QShortcut. Add _setup_mcp_server() with ActionRegistry — starts MCP on :9812, gracefully degrades if ProjectModel not yet integrated.
Phase-14.stop-condition: Ctrl+D toggles dock. LogBridge captures loguru messages. StatePanel shows correct clip count. MCP tools/list returns expected tools. All 26 debug tests pass.

Phase-15.name: McpE2eHardening
Phase-15.goal: Turn MCP server into a reliable E2E test harness: operation lifecycle, structured errors, confirm policy, full read/write tools, canonical 5-stage pipeline (Quick Preview/Detect/Auto Align/Process Notes/Auto), Auto Align completion, project validator, headless E2E runner + scenarios + reports. 6 atomic commits on test/mcp-e2e-hardening.
Phase-15.step-43: Register in graph. Already implemented + tested. Add clear() on restart.
Phase-15.step-44: Commit 1 foundation: OperationError, ConfirmPolicy, write_json_atomic. 17/17 tests.
Phase-15.step-45: Wire operations into MCP, extended read tools, full write tools, port/restart hardening. 43/43 tests.
Phase-15.step-46: Separate 5 stages, canonical commands via uid, app_service wired into MCP, GUI buttons. 46/46 tests.
Phase-15.step-47: Coordinated choice, idempotency, rollback, cue metrics. 13/13 tests.
Phase-15.step-48: Validator, snapshot, E2E scenario stubs. 6/6 validator tests.
Phase-15.step-49: Negative scenarios E2E-101..119, regression tests, targeted fixes, findings F-0041..F-0043.
Phase-15.step-50: Commit 6: refresh docs/findings, final status. 102/102 tests passing.
Phase-15.stop-condition: All E2E happy-path scenarios pass against synthetic fixtures. 102/102 tests. Branch test/mcp-e2e-hardening with 7 commits ready for PR.

Phase-16.name: DomainRefactoring
Phase-16.goal: Incremental layered architecture: domain/application/ports/infrastructure/adapters. 9 phases, no Big Bang. See docs/architecture.md for full context, layers, sequence diagrams, and migration table.
Phase-16.step-1: Audit existing E2E-001..015; classify each as passing/failing/stub/env. Create real characterization tests exercising equivalent operations through all paths (application service, CLI, MCP, GUI). Use synthetic fixture for deterministic baselines. Freeze valid behavior, record known bugs in findings.
Phase-16.step-2: Create domain/value_objects.py: SlideId, TimeInterval (frozen, validated), ArtifactRef, PipelineState enum. Replace raw float tuples in critical paths. No behavioral change.
Phase-16.step-3: Create domain/project.py: Project as aggregate root with add_slide(), remove_slide(), replace_detected_slides(), invalidate_downstream_from(). Internal Pydantic model delegates.
Phase-16.step-4: Repository port and initial FileProjectRepository foundation. Contract is provisional until Step 4.7.
Phase-16.step-4.7: Introduce strict ProjectDocumentV2, full PipelineState round-trip, side-effect-free rehydration, LoadedProject revision unit, portable root handling, revisioned slides.json, and strict storage validation. Strict ProjectDocumentV2, complete pipeline DTO, portable artifacts, and full UUID SlideId. Deterministic migration, extension preservation, and side-effect-free complete-state rehydration. LoadedProject, raw schema dispatch, strict V2 commits, and optimistic load-edit-save cycle. Revisioned derived artifact, strict canonical/domain/derived validation, and aggregate validate gate.
Phase-16.step-5: Common DTOs, errors, cancellation, observer, and service context. Preview and Detection services with revision-safe ports. Alignment service with dry-run/apply. Notes service with basic/LLM modes. Export and Validation services. Auto orchestration service. Adapters, bootstrap, characterization. Services depend only on domain and ports, never GUI, MCP, CLI, or concrete infrastructure.
Phase-16.step-6: MCP operation dispatch calls Phase 16 services through McpServiceAdapter and a dedicated composition root. Legacy CV/subtitle/export functions are isolated behind port adapters; FileProjectRepository remains the canonical writer. GUI completion refresh and slide CRUD preserve schema 2.0 while projecting canonical state into the legacy Qt model.
Phase-16.step-7: CLI commands call same services as MCP. preview/align/validate/auto dispatched through ApplicationServices on the real console entry point. Architecture tests forbid legacy pipeline imports from adapter code. 51 module tests + full non-E2E suite pass.
Phase-16.step-8:
Extract ProjectController, PipelineController, TimelineController. Workers call use cases. MainWindow below 600 LOC. Async pipeline, SlideId boundary, ArtifactRef frames, CI green.
Reproduce and fix asynchronous pipeline execution, operation-scoped progress/cancellation, canonical project-state and revision ownership, display-index to SlideId adaptation, canonical set-frame persistence, Qt button state, playback routing F-0058, MainWindow below 600 LOC, and all required GitHub workflows. Step 9 is blocked until every gate is green.
Phase-16.step-9: Delete 6 dead modules (workers, timeline_v2, timeline_widget, mcp_composition, command_router, app_service), remove @mcp_action/ActionRegistry from MainWindow, add architecture tests enforcing clean layering. Canonical source of truth: Project aggregate + FileProjectRepository.
Phase-16.step-9.5: Switch console entry point to adapters/cli/app.py with project/gui commands. CLI architecture rule forbids legacy pipeline imports. PipelineController: operation lifecycle with start acknowledgement, busy state, rejection signals. StatusBarManager: operation identity to reject stale cross-operation updates. MainWindow: disable pipeline buttons during operation, reject concurrent starts. Fix Windows 3.12 test_list_operations_ordered race. 928 non-E2E tests + 11 MCP char tests pass. CI: 10/13 green (3 Qt/Xvfb env).
Phase-16.step-10: DetectionConfig schema 2.0 round-trip. Legacy migration. ProjectSettingsDialog canonical save route. Detection/Preview/Auto project-bound input resolution. decoder_backend propagation. F-0075/F-0076 regression tests with GUI integration evidence.
Phase-16.stop-condition: All existing 568+ tests pass at each phase. Architecture rules enforced in CI. No PySide6 in domain/ or application/. MainWindow does not contain pipeline business logic. MCP does not call GUI slots. One canonical source of project state.

Phase-17.name: WindowsPackaging
Phase-17.goal: Standalone Windows desktop application with installer, clean-machine verification, and GitHub Release pipeline.
Phase-17.step-0: ApplicationIdentity, BuildInfo, AboutDialog, Help menu. version=__version__ single source.
Phase-17.step-4: Nuitka benchmark deferred for first beta. PyInstaller selected as deliberate first-beta packaging decision. Rationale: minimize release risk, simplify native dependency debugging, obtain stable inspectable onedir bundle. See docs/architecture.md packaging ADR section.
Phase-17.step-5.5: UpdateService, GitHubReleaseProvider, UpdateController, UpdateAvailableDialog. Help → Check for Updates works. Startup check non-blocking. Stable/Beta channels.
Phase-17.step-7: Recover accepted README payload and exactly one canonical SetupIconFile directive; retain the canonical onedir layout and absence of the invalid --uninstall hook and dead .v2pp association.
Phase-17.step-8: Real MCP smoke test: port discovery, initialize, tools/list, state read, shutdown.
Phase-17.step-9: Fixed: windows-release dependency profile, prerelease via packaging.version, tag/package version validation.
Phase-17.step-10.5: --diagnostics flag for packaged capability verification. BuildInfo preserves packaging_tool/build_time.

Phase-18.name: DetectPerformance
Phase-18.goal: Measure, analyze, and optimize slide detection throughput without degrading quality. Baseline → bottleneck analysis → targeted optimizations → re-benchmark on Hermes.
Phase-18.step-18.1: M-DETECT-METRICS module (detection_metrics.py), instrument detector/detect_slides/pyav_backend, tools/benchmark_detect.py, initial Hermes run (partial — timeout during Pass 3). Recovery requires deterministic RSS lifecycle/max tests and exact OpenCV/PyAV telemetry tests before baseline evidence can be trusted; no benchmark or optimization is part of recovery. Key finding: 3-pass structure redundant (Pass 3 only saves screenshots). Step closed after r2 benchmark (465d89e) with signature-match=true, invariants=6PASS/1SKIP.
Phase-18.step-18.2: Collapse Pass 3 (save screenshots) into Pass 2 (dedup frame grab). decoder.iter_frames() calls reduced from 3 to 2. run_detect_slides: unified DEDUPE_AND_SAVE_SCREENSHOTS block. Log markers updated from Pass X/3 to Pass X/2. Verified: all detect_slides tests pass, no "Pass 3/3" markers remain.
Phase-18.step-18.3: Re-run the immutable short-video benchmark on the recovered tree before making any bottleneck or optimization decision. The historical 8623cd2 result is regressed-tree context only and is not accepted as current evidence. The c372ced series (3 runs: mean 237.7s) is credible recovered-tree measurement evidence but SUPERSEDED_FOR_STEP_18_3_ACCEPTANCE due to incomplete reporting and aggregate evidence contract (B-18.3-02, B-18.3-03). New r2 series completed with corrected tooling APIs (BENCHMARK_CODE_HEAD=465d89e) and tested aggregation. 3 recorded runs: mean 254.5s (276.1s/222.2s/265.1s), std dev 28.48s Output signature 8cc06c6accb055fb matches historical — no quality regression. median_run_id=run-03, measured_stage_total=177.7s, residual=87.4s (33.0%) Invariants: 6 PASS, 1 SKIPPED (psutil). F-0088 observed: 28 slides, 6 PNGs.
Phase-18.step-18.4: Instrumented pass1_decode_or_frame_advance, pass2_decode_or_frame_advance, and pass2_match_and_collect via InstrumentedIterator. 3-run benchmark series (hermes-600s-f0097-instrumented-20260713-acb424f) with corrected aggregate evidence. Canonical signature 8cc06c6accb055fb — no quality regression. Residual dropped from 87.39s (33.0%) to 0.53s (0.19%). Decision: DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE (172.46s, 63.27%), HIGH confidence. F-0097 resolved. F-0098 open. Selected optimization: NONE — PYAV_HWACCEL_CUDA was REJECTED_SOURCE_MODEL_MISMATCH because existing source already requests HWAccel. No replacement optimization is sufficiently supported by committed evidence. Step 18.4 remains in_progress until V-PERF-DETECT-BOTTLENECK contract is satisfied (exactly one targeted optimization with name, code boundaries, hypothesis). Step 18.6 output parity gates defined in bottleneck_decision.json step18_6_output_parity_gates. See F-0097 and F-0098 for full evidence.
Phase-18.step-18.4a: Evidence mechanism implemented and corrected. Separates raw codec_context_is_hwaccel from actual_hardware_decode_active. Includes creation-error capture, deterministic generator cleanup, provenance-validated probe with --canonical-mode and --accepted-base. 17/17 tests pass. However, the canonical Hermes H.264 benchmark clip (examples/hermes-0000-1000.mp4, SHA256 dd9da344...) is NOT available on this workstation. Step 18.4A remains blocked on the canonical evidence object until the clip is obtained. F-0098 remains OPEN. No targeted optimization selected.
Phase-18.step-18.5: Blocked: Step 18.4 has not selected a targeted optimization. Step 18.5 remains planned and must not start implementation until Step 18.4 selects exactly one optimization.
Phase-18.step-18.6: Repeat the immutable short-video protocol and compare performance and quality evidence.
Phase-18.step-18.7: Run the full Hermes benchmark only after the short-video re-benchmark passes.
Phase-18.step-18.8: Accept performance work only when the recovered-tree quality and timing gates pass.

DS-COLAB.NAME: GoogleColab
DS-COLAB.purpose: Run pipeline on Google Colab with free T4 GPU.

DS-BINARY.NAME: BinaryDistribution
DS-BINARY.purpose: Standalone executable with PyInstaller for users without Python.
